title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - OLX India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Senior Software Engineer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
